misconfig_patterns: Default root:singlestore credentials in trial/community deployments
Studio UI at :8080 exposes full database browser

active_probe.false_positive_check: MySQL banner at :3306 must include SingleStore string to distinguish from plain MySQL

deployment_tells: MySQL banner at :3306 includes SingleStore version string
Studio UI at :8080 accessible with default root:singlestore
dot_product() / l2_distance() UDFs indicate vector workload
pivot_paths: Studio :8080 → full schema browser with default credentials
SHOW CREATE TABLE {t} → detect vector workload via UDF usage
